title: Online dry-tyre legality state
summary: Add an online driver-race dry-compound legality state feature block to 001214.
rationale: Dry F1 races impose compound-use constraints. This patch models whether a driver has already used enough dry compounds, whether the current compound is reused, and whether a stop debt remains. This is a real domain mechanism not directly visible from row-local features.
implementation_hint: Start from 001214 exactly. Add only the online legality block using the formulas below. Sort rows by `Driver, Race, Year, LapNumber, original_row_order` with stable mergesort. Within each group, define `is_soft`, `is_medium`, `is_hard`, `is_dry_now`, `is_wet_now`; compute cumulative seen flags `soft_seen_to_date`, `medium_seen_to_date`, `hard_seen_to_date`, `wet_seen_to_date` using groupby cumsum up to the current row only. Compute `prior_soft = cumsum(is_soft) - is_soft` etc.; `current_compound_already_used = current dry compound prior count > 0`; `distinct_dry_used = soft_seen_to_date + medium_seen_to_date + hard_seen_to_date`; `used_dry_set` from dry-set code `soft + 2*medium + 4*hard`; `wet_exemption_flag = wet_seen_to_date`; `remaining_required_dry_count = 0 if wet_exemption_flag else clip(2 - distinct_dry_used, 0, 2)`; `stop_debt_if_dry = is_dry_now & !wet_exemption_flag & remaining_required_dry_count > 0 & remaining_laps_est > 0`; `laps_remaining_when_still_illegal = remaining_laps_est * stop_debt_if_dry`; `dry_legality_pressure = stop_debt_if_dry * remaining_laps_est / (remaining_required_dry_count + 1)`; `illegal_on_reused_dry = stop_debt_if_dry * current_compound_already_used`; `dry_legality_x_finishable = stop_debt_if_dry * can_finish_current_tyre`. Do not use future rows, target values, OOF predictions, or public score.
expected_effect: Expose regulation-driven pit pressure in dry races and improve late-race ranking for drivers still owing a legal compound change.
risk: The online state is sensitive to row ordering and synthetic data semantics; any accidental future leakage would invalidate CV.
